title: space_set partial update: name written but notUpdated on member patch failure
description: Trigger: patch {"name":"Foo","members/bar":{"role":"superadmin"}} — update_space_props writes the name to the store at line 1041, then apply_member_patch fails with invalidArguments. The space goes into notUpdated, but the name was already persisted. RFC 8620 §7.1 requires atomic updates: if notUpdated is returned for an id, no property change was applied. A client that reads the spec will assume nothing changed and may retry the patch, or cache the old name thinking the server rejected everything. The atomicity issue was pre-existing but was inaccessible before the name/description skip fix — combined patches are now reachable. Fix: run update_space_props only if the member patch loop also succeeds, or wrap both operations in a DB transaction.
